summary: Solid soundboard recording with extra bass and clear mix, featuring a well‑received Terrapin Station performance.
review: Reviewers praise the soundboard source for its fuller low end and cleaner texture compared to matrix versions, noting only minor audience noise. The concert itself is regarded as a five‑star show with Terrapin Station highlighted as a standout moment, though specific song details are sparse.

ai_rating.rationale: Two strong positive reviews (5 and 4 stars) focus on good soundboard quality and overall show excellence; the third review offers technical discussion but does not detract from the positive consensus.

recording_quality.technical_notes: More bass and cleaner than matrix mixes, slight flat/dry character, some audience noise present but overall clear and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not detail set pacing, but the performance is broadly praised as a five‑star show.
